calendar.matters:
PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-23-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Maeve and Jon Emerson / Plaintiff in Pro Per;
Koorosh Ghahremani / Defendant in Pro Per.

Plaintiff testifies on his/her own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduce:

Exhibit 1 - Paid invoice for diagnostic testing by SF European

Exhibit 2 - Paid invoice for Crancase breather intake by SF European

Exhibit 3 - Daily Car rental rate from Expedia .com

Defendant testifies on his own behalf. No documentary evidence is introduce.

At the conclusion of the hearing , The Court orders matter submitted and finds for Plaintiff . Judge: Honorable Daniel Flores; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany; Reporter: Not reported.
